insulation_spec.note: Values as read by owner from labelled crops 2026-07-12; energy-disclosure PDF is image-only so no independent cross-check yet. None of these drive owner decisions (KB performance path).
insulation_spec.ext_wall_2x6: ILLEGIBLE AT CAPTURE RESOLUTION — three readers conflict (manual R-2x, owner 5x, OCR 38). Physics caps kraft-faced 2×6 batts at ~R-23, making R-23 the most probable value. Zero decision impact. Definitive resolution: photograph a batt label during the insulation-stage walk.
insulation_spec.crawl_wall: R-19 drapes (assumed same as basement; original read ambiguous)
insulation_spec.crawl_vapour_barrier: Guardian liner 10 mil ASTM E96-B, mechanically fastened, taped seams/penetrations
